subject: Mar 22nd, 2026
fact: The session events take place on Mar 22nd, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Mar 22nd, 2026

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a demon-haunted city in the Underdark currently occupied by fire giants.
source_quote: demon-haunted city of Maerimydra

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a formidable tower in Maerimydra overseen by Vraxen.
source_quote: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: fire giant
fact: A fire giant named Brandyr stands watch over a ritual courtyard.
source_quote: fire giant Brandyr, a towering sentinel standing watch over a ritual courtyard

subject: ritual courtyard
fact: The ritual courtyard has a polished obsidian floor and ebony pillars branded with the crimson six-fingered hand of Graz'zt.
source_quote: ritual courtyard of polished obsidian, its ebony pillars each branded with the crimson six-fingered hand of the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord whose six-fingered hand mark brands the pillars of the courtyard.
source_quote: demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr is a fire giant who is dropped into a deep slumber by Felkur's enchantment.
source_quote: dropped the massive giant into a deep, helpless slumber

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur unleashes a devastating enchantment on Brandyr.
source_quote: Felkur unleashed a devastating enchantment

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim works with Daein to shrink Brandyr's frame.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein worked in tandem to shrink her enormous frame

subject: Daein
fact: Daein works with Bramgrim to shrink Brandyr and later conjures an illusion of Graz'zt's voice.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein worked in tandem to shrink her enormous frame

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas is cloaked in invisibility when he shoves the shrunken giant into a portable hole.
source_quote: Akritas — cloaked in invisibility — swept in and shoved the shrunken giant into a portable hole

subject: portable hole
fact: A portable hole fitted with a breathing apparatus is used to hide the shrunken giant.
source_quote: portable hole fitted with a breathing apparatus

subject: cambion
fact: Cambion guards stationed at the courtyard are left bewildered by the giant's disappearance.
source_quote: cambion guards stationed at the courtyard were left utterly bewildered

subject: Daein
fact: Daein conjures a flawless imitation of Graz'zt's voice.
source_quote: Daein conjured a flawless imitation of Graz'zt's terrible voice

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is an imp companion who reveals the layout of the Spire and the nature of the evening's gathering.
source_quote: party consulted their imp companion Pipyap

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a fox-faced Arcanaloth who serves as Graz'zt's contract enforcer.
source_quote: Vraxen, the fox-faced Arcanaloth who served as Graz'zt's contract enforcer

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a smoke-weeping fire giant who runs the city's Colosseum, duels, and betting pool.
source_quote: Veperyd, a smoke-weeping fire giant who ran the city's Colosseum, duels, and betting pool

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris is a cold and calculating mage from Mulmaster.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris, a cold and calculating mage from Mulmaster

subject: runic key
fact: Vraxen keeps a runic key on his person which is the only means of accessing the upper vaults.
source_quote: Vraxen kept a runic key on his person — the only means of accessing the upper vaults

subject: upper vaults
fact: The upper vaults are where the Lexicon of Oaths is hidden.
source_quote: upper vaults where the Lexicon of Oaths was hidden

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a book that likely contains proof of Felkur's identity as the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: Lexicon of Oaths likely contained proof of Felkur's identity as the infamous Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a figure who has engineered a double cross involving the Lexicon.
source_quote: Maram il Vass had engineered a double cross

subject: Phantom Ghost
fact: Felkur is identified as the infamous Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster.
source_quote: infamous Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster

subject: Hillsfar
fact: The party poses as traders from Hillsfar to gain entry to the dinner.
source_quote: traders from Hillsfar bearing critical information

subject: dining hall
fact: The dining hall contains a magically distorted table that makes guests of different sizes appear at eye level.
source_quote: magically distorted table made a fire giant, a demon, and a human mage all appear to be seated at eye level with one another

subject: sulfur
fact: The air in the dining hall is thick with sulfur.
source_quote: air was thick with sulfur

subject: wine
fact: The air in the dining hall is thick with expensive wine.
source_quote: expensive wine

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen needles Veperyd about skimming from the betting pool.
source_quote: Vraxen was already needling Veperyd about skimming from the betting pool

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd responds to Vraxen's needling with barely restrained volcanic rage.
source_quote: Veperyd responded with barely restrained volcanic rage

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris identifies Felkur as a man with the hands of a master smith and the eyes of a man who has seen a Mulmaster cell.
source_quote: identifying him as someone with the hands of a master smith and the eyes of a man who had seen the inside of a Mulmaster cell

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur is identified by Veris as having the hands of a master smith.
source_quote: hands of a master smith

subject: Daein
fact: Daein and Bramgrim redirect the conversation toward the Colosseum's finances.
source_quote: Daein and Bramgrim loudly redirected the conversation toward the Colosseum's finances

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim and Daein stoke the tension between Vraxen and Veperyd.
source_quote: stoking the already smoldering tension between Vraxen and Veperyd

subject: owlbear
fact: The party's owlbear companion leaps onto the formal dinner table and begins smashing everything in sight.
source_quote: owlbear companion — apparently concluding that since everyone at the table was pounding and roaring, this must simply be a pounding room — leapt onto the formal dinner table and began smashing everything in sight

subject: telekinetic theft
fact: Daein silently drags the runic key across the obsidian table and into the party's possession.
source_quote: Daein reached out with his telekinetic power and silently dragged the runic key across the obsidian table and into the party's possession

subject: illusion of Veris
fact: Daein conjures an illusion of High Inquisitor Veris's voice insinuating a conspiracy to skim from the betting pool.
source_quote: Daein conjured one final illusion — the voice of High Inquisitor Veris himself — insinuating that the mage had been conspiring with Veperyd to skim from the betting pool

subject: three-way brawl
fact: The room descends into a three-way brawl of demons, giants, and wizards after Vraxen orders his guards to flay the giant.
source_quote: Vraxen shrieked about treason and ordered his guards to flay the giant, while Veperyd roared back with a promise to repay the debt in blood

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen shrieks about treason and orders his guards to flay the giant.
source_quote: Vraxen shrieked about treason and ordered his guards to flay the giant

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd roars back with a promise to repay the debt in blood.
source_quote: Veperyd roared back with a promise to repay the debt in blood

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris reaches for his staff as the room descends into a brawl.
source_quote: Veris, furious and exposed, reached for his staff

subject: corridors of the Spire
fact: The party moves through the corridors of the Spire while the sounds of battle echo below.
source_quote: moved through the corridors of the Spire, the runic key in hand and the sounds of battle echoing below them

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is noticed to be gone as the party moves through the corridors.
source_quote: Pipyap was gone

subject: teleportation device
fact: A teleportation device that would carry the party out of Maerimydra waits somewhere above.
source_quote: teleportation device that would carry them out of Maerimydra still waited somewhere above

subject: Colosseum
fact: Veperyd runs the Colosseum in Maerimydra.
source_quote: ran the city's Colosseum

subject: Mulmaster
fact: Mulmaster is a surface city known for its powerful wizards and is the origin of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: surface city known for its powerful wizards, mentioned as the origin of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: divination artifact
fact: Felkur accidentally stole a potent divination artifact from Mulmaster years ago.
source_quote: Felkur accidentally stole a potent divination artifact years ago

subject: fire giants
fact: Fire giants have encroached on the demonic prestige of the cambions.
source_quote: resentful of the giants who had encroached on their demonic prestige

subject: betting pool
fact: Vraxen suspects Veperyd of skimming from the Colosseum's betting pool.
source_quote: skimming from the betting pool

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is obsessed with financial accuracy.
source_quote: obsessed with financial accuracy

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd's skin weeps oily black smoke.
source_quote: skin weeps oily black smoke

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is obsessed with food and prone to making difficult deals for information.
source_quote: obsessed with food and prone to making difficult deals for his information

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur cast a high-potency sleep spell using a specialized magical token.
source_quote: A specialized item used by Felkur to cast a high-potency sleep spell

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was left with four tokens remaining after using the sleep spell.
source_quote: Using it left Felkur with four tokens remaining

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur stole a powerful divination artifact originally from Mulmaster.
source_quote: A powerful item originally stolen from Mulmaster by Felkur

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur did not know what the divination artifact was when he stole it.
source_quote: who did not know what it was

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur accidentally activated the divination artifact.
source_quote: Felkur accidentally activated it

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur sold the divination artifact for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: and then sold it for 45 gold pieces

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur's identity as the Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster is believed to be contained in The Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: expose Felkur's true identity as the Phantom Ghost thief of Mulmaster

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr is a fire giant.
source_quote: the fire giant Brandyr

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr's natural defenses were bypassed by Felkur's sleep spell.
source_quote: bypassed the fire giant Brandyr's natural defenses

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr was unconscious and shrunken when hidden in the portable hole.
source_quote: hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr's frame was reduced by two size categories.
source_quote: shrink the fire giant Brandyr's massive frame down to a manageable size

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast the Reduce spell on Brandyr.
source_quote: cast twice — by Bramgrim and Daein

subject: Daein
fact: Daein cast the Reduce spell on Brandyr.
source_quote: cast twice — by Bramgrim and Daein

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of the demon lord Graz'zt.
source_quote: mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Telekinetic Movement to pull the runic key across the dining table.
source_quote: Used by Daein to silently pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas used Nature's Veil to become invisible as a bonus action.
source_quote: A ranger ability used by Akritas to become invisible as a bonus action

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas approached the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected.
source_quote: allowing her to approach the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas cast Pass Without Trace to boost the party's stealth.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas to provide a significant boost to the entire party's stealth

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas used Pass Without Trace to mask movements and sounds while retreating from the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: as they retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen carried a runic key that grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A key carried by Vraxen that grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen was tricked into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd.
source_quote: tricking Vraxen into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a High Inquisitor.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veris
fact: Veris was referenced in a deception by Daein involving a conspiracy.
source_quote: believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: General Veperyd
fact: General Veperyd was referenced in a deception by Daein involving a conspiracy.
source_quote: believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass desires The Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: It is desired by Maram il Vass

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord.
source_quote: the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt's voice was mimicked by Daein to deceive the Cambion guards.
source_quote: mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt to deceive the Cambion guards

subject: Cambion guards
fact: Cambion guards were deceived by Daein's Minor Illusion into abandoning their posts.
source_quote: deceive the Cambion guards into abandoning their posts

subject: Cambion guards
fact: Cambion guards were present near the incapacitated giant.
source_quote: approach the incapacitated giant and the cambion guards undetected

subject: Owlbear
fact: An Owlbear caused a rampage during the dinner.
source_quote: distracted by the Owlbear's rampage

subject: Mulmaster's hierarchy
fact: Mulmaster's hierarchy conducted years of investigation triggered by the sale of the divination artifact.
source_quote: triggering years of investigation by Mulmaster's hierarchy

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains upper vaults accessible by a runic key.
source_quote: grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: upper vaults
fact: The upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contain The Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: obsidian dining table
fact: The runic key was dangling loose on the obsidian dining table during the dinner.
source_quote: dangling loose on the obsidian dining table during the chaos of the dinner

subject: obsidian dining table
fact: The runic key was pulled across the obsidian dining table by Daein.
source_quote: pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The party retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard

subject: Magical Token
fact: A magical token was used by Felkur to cast a high-potency sleep spell.
source_quote: A specialized item used by Felkur to cast a high-potency sleep spell

subject: Magical Token
fact: Four magical tokens remained after Felkur used one.
source_quote: left Felkur with four tokens remaining

subject: Portable Hole
fact: A portable hole was equipped with a custom-built breathing apparatus.
source_quote: equipped with a custom-built breathing apparatus

subject: Portable Hole
fact: The party used the portable hole to hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: used by the party to hide the unconscious and shrunken fire giant Brandyr

subject: Reduction Scroll
fact: Two reduction scrolls were used to shrink the fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: Two scrolls were used to reduce her by two size categories

subject: Reduction Scroll
fact: The reduction scrolls reduced Brandyr by two size categories.
source_quote: reduce her by two size categories

subject: Runic Key
fact: A runic key grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: grants access to the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Runic Key
fact: The runic key was snatched by the party using telekinesis.
source_quote: snatched by the party using telekinesis

subject: Seeming Scroll
fact: The party held a Seeming Scroll as a backup plan to disguise themselves as servants.
source_quote: A magical scroll held by the party as a backup plan to disguise themselves as servants

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a powerful book located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A powerful book located within the upper vaults of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is desired by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: It is desired by Maram il Vass

subject: The Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is believed to contain information exposing Felkur's true identity.
source_quote: believed to contain information that could expose Felkur's true identity

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: A divination artifact grants perfect divination and protection from scrying.
source_quote: It grants perfect divination and protection from scrying

subject: Divination Artifact
fact: The divination artifact was sold for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: sold it for 45 gold pieces

subject: sleep spell
fact: Felkur cast a sleep spell that incapacitated the fire giant Brandyr.
source_quote: successfully incapacitated the fire giant Brandyr

subject: reduce spell
fact: Bramgrim and Daein cast the Reduce spell twice on Brandyr.
source_quote: A transmutation spell cast twice — by Bramgrim and Daein

subject: reduce spell
fact: No saving throw was required for the Reduce spell because Brandyr was incapacitated.
source_quote: Because Brandyr was incapacitated, no saving throw was required

subject: Nature's Veil
fact: Akritas used Nature's Veil to become invisible as a bonus action.
source_quote: used by Akritas to become invisible as a bonus action

subject: Pass Without Trace
fact: Akritas cast Pass Without Trace to mask the party's movements and sounds.
source_quote: masking their movements and sounds

subject: Minor Illusion
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of Graz'zt.
source_quote: first by Daein to mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Minor Illusion
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: later to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Telekinetic Movement
fact: Daein used Telekinetic Movement to pull the runic key into the party's possession.
source_quote: into the party's possession while the hosts were distracted

subject: Owlbear rampage
fact: The hosts were distracted by the Owlbear's rampage.
source_quote: while the hosts were distracted by the Owlbear's rampage
